sync_note: This manifest enumerates the cumulative datasets associated with the EA-EROSION-01 instrument. Some datasets are stored canonically at alexanarch.org and referenced here; others have local mirror copies under /datasets/<name>/ for offline durability. Mirrors are pulled from alexanarch via datasets/sync-from-alexanarch.sh. The canonical location is always the authoritative version.

datasets.title: PID Erosion Observatory — Epoch Captures (DC/FC/ZD/XR/ZD-A lanes)
datasets.description: Cumulative epoch captures across five lanes: DC (registry-wide census), FC (founding-case), ZD (Zenodo deletion snapshots), XR (cross-registry propagation), ZD-A (deletion-classifier audits). Sixteen epoch records to date, each with its own JSON. Canonical URLs enumerated in the epochs table at persistentidentifiers.org/#sec-epochs.

datasets.title: Zenodo Deletion Ledger — CHA-Cohort Extraction + Full Exports
datasets.description: The two Zenodo bulk deletion exports (2026-06-07 and 2026-07-10) plus the CHA-cohort extraction (1,136 CHA rows from the June 19 event) and the tombstone census (2,005 API tombstones for the CHA event). Includes the raw gzipped CSVs, per-record tombstone JSON, and the tombstone-mirror captures. This is the raw substrate the audit datasets are derived from.

datasets.title: Provenance Erasure at Outcome Level — 33-Day Set-Comparison Test
datasets.governing_deposit: PENDING (candidate for mint at alexanarch as EA-EROSION-EMPIRICAL-01 v0.1)
datasets.description: Companion datasets for EA-EROSION-EMPIRICAL-01 v0.1. Set-comparison test of Zenodo's classifier as accrual-sorting apparatus, following NEGSHAPE-01 (AXN:0444, #1075) citation discipline. Empirical confirmation of Provenance Debt (AXN:03B7, #939) §3 at outcome level: ~30x differential in survival between institutional and independent AI-augmented composition. Sovereign identifiers for the two Zenodo exports, the Wu withdrawal cascade, and 15 terminated-independent cascades enumerated.

datasets.title: The Negative Shape of the Work — Deletion Bibliography & Bibliographic Matrix
datasets.note: referenced only; not locally mirrored at PEO. Canonical is the primary access point.
datasets.description: Appendix A + B of EA-NEGSHAPE-01 v0.2 (AXN:0444, #1075). 1,834 identifier entries enumerated; 1,621 membership-confirmed; 6,484 formal citations rendered across four formats; container-object citation for CHA-DELETION-CORPUS-20260619; rejected-candidate ledger (68 entries). Establishes the citation discipline this observatory's audit datasets follow.

sync_protocol.mirror_directive: For every dataset with a `local_mirror` path, the mirror copies the canonical files verbatim. Mirrors are refreshed by executing datasets/sync-from-alexanarch.sh from the PEO repo root. The script uses curl against alexanarch.org's static endpoints and writes into the appropriate /datasets/<name>/ directory; sha256 is verified against the manifest at time of pull.
sync_protocol.on_conflict: If canonical and mirror diverge, canonical always wins. Any local edit to a mirror is treated as a merge conflict requiring resolution at the canonical source, not at the mirror.
sync_protocol.cadence: Manual for now. A GitHub Action on the PEO repo can be scheduled to run sync-from-alexanarch.sh nightly and commit changes on drift; not yet wired.
